intentSynonyms: count workflows matching a query in temporal
count workflow executions matching an optional visibility query in temporal
description: Count workflow executions matching an optional visibility query. Useful for getting a quick overview of workflow states without fetching full execution data.

namespace.description: Temporal namespace (e.g., "prod-us-west-2.abc123"). Defaults to the namespace in the current browser tab.

query.description: Temporal visibility query filter (e.g., ExecutionStatus="Failed" AND CloseTime > "2024-01-01")
